name: Flat in london
description: I'm in a Flat in london
hints: This is your home base and treasure room. Take stock of what is here before leaving.
The rum, sneakers, and crackers may all be useful later. The stairs lead upward.
GET RUM, GET SNEAKERS, GET CRACKERS. The rug hides something - MOVE RUG or LOOK under it.
GO STAIRS to go up to the alcove. Bring treasures back here and SAY SCORE to check progress.

needs: Flight of stairs (must be in room)

notes: Starting room and treasure repository for Pirate Adventure. Contains useful starting items: rum (give to pirate), sneakers (safe movement), crackers (feed to parrot). GO STAIRS to begin exploring.
